entries.problemPattern: N+1 query — related rows fetched inside a loop
entries.fixMethod: Collect ids first, single WHERE id IN (...) or JOIN, map back to parent rows

entries.problemPattern: Oversized function mixing validation, I/O, and formatting (80+ lines)
entries.fixMethod: Extract pure helpers for validation and formatting; keep orchestration in a thin top-level function

entries.problemPattern: Empty catch block swallows errors with no log or rethrow
entries.fixMethod: Log with context at minimum; rethrow or return typed error for callers when failure must propagate

entries.problemPattern: SQL built via string concatenation with user input
entries.fixMethod: Use parameterized queries / prepared statements; never interpolate raw user values into SQL
